title: zornia elegans
intro: Zornia elegans, also known as Mexican firecracker or wild pellitory, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and it has been used to treat conditions like arthritis, gout, and skin irritations. Zornia elegans can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it is also used in some traditional remedies.
